title: Executive Producer Review
description: Per-run budget / time / revision accounting emitted by the music-video-anime executive_producer stage (M-9 fix 2026-07-21). Records whether the pipeline stayed within orchestration limits declared in pipeline_defs/music-video-anime.yaml:orchestration.

budget_consumed_usd.description: Total USD spent across all paid tool calls in the run. Local/free tools contribute 0.

budget_limit_usd.description: Per-pipeline budget_default_usd from the manifest orchestration block. Typically 0.50.

wall_time_minutes.description: End-to-end wall time from research start to publish completion.

revisions_per_stage.description: Map of stage name to revision count. Each value must be <= max_revisions_per_stage.

send_backs.description: Total send-backs across the entire run (one stage forcibly re-run by reviewer).

within_limits.description: True iff every limit (budget / wall_time / revisions / send_backs) is respected AND all stage success_criteria pass.

decision.description: EP verdict. approved_with_notes records over-budget / over-time runs that completed anyway; rejected halts further automation and surfaces to the user.

decision_log_ep_decision_id.description: Pointer into decision_log for the ep_decision entry recorded by the EP stage. Format: decision_log.id value.
